demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse; spouse present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up and my big toe feels like it's been smashed with a hammer and set on fire. I can't even let the bedsheet touch it.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on suddenly overnight and is so bad I can't stand on my foot or sleep — I need something for it and to know what's going on.

symptom_narrative.onset: started suddenly at about 2 AM and has been getting worse for the last 6 hours
symptom_narrative.character: excruciating — like being hit with a hammer and burning at the same time; the joint feels swollen and hot
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst pain I've ever had; I can't bear anything touching it, not even the bedsheet
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my right big toe, at the base where it joins the foot
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it woke me up, only getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing; keeping it completely still and uncovered helps a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement or the lightest touch — even the weight of the blanket is unbearable
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I feel a bit feverish and had some chills; the toe looks bright red and puffy
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a couple of bad flare-ups of joint pain like this over the years that settled on their own after a few days, but never anything this severe
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't put any weight on the foot at all — I've been hopping or crawling to the bathroom

past_medical_history.how_managed: I take a water tablet for it every day

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: occasional bad joint flare-ups in the past that came and went on their own

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a water tablet for my blood pressure

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: I was at a big banquet last night and had quite a bit to drink, plus a lot of rich meat
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: ate heavily last night — lots of red meat and alcohol at the function
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the pain started in the early hours after the banquet; my spouse is here with me

objective_data_offered.value: right big-toe joint looks bright red, shiny and swollen; skin over it looks tight
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: appearance over a video call only — extent of redness, warmth and any spread cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: feels feverish with some chills; has not measured a temperature
